name: smartreserve
description: Plateforme de réservation intelligente - Architecture microservices Node.js

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services/user-service && npm install && cd ../catalog-service && npm install && cd ../booking-service && npm install && cd ../../client && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:user" "npm run start:catalog" "npm run start:booking" "npm run start:gateway"
